subject:
Re: I create an artifact map of teamtomo.org EMPIAR-10164 dataset
 in 1.6Apx
body:
*Then, I create the full tomograms in warp.*

*The dimension was 8000*8000*6000. It was same setting as the last 
figure(3D ctf)*

*[image: 1624029984(1).png]*
*Pick particles and extract in dynamo.*
In matlab R2020a in dynamo folder:
*warp2catalogue('../frames/reconstruction', 10); dcm warp_catalogue*
I *only chose the intact VLP* and apply the dipole2vesicle script.
TS_01: 9             TS_03:  6               TS_43:  5              
 TS_45:  5              TS_54:   2
And then, I extract two VLP in TS_01 and TS_03 *without dBox mode*. 
The folder *inimodelData.Data* contains *2649* particles.
I used the dcp in dynamo and the result was like this:(I think it was good.)
[image: 1624031060(1).png]

*Symmetry expansion:*
*align_symmetry_axis*

And then, I continued to* align all particles*.
The folder *findallData.Data* contains *31561* particles  *without dBox 
mode*. 
I used the dcp in dynamo and the result was like this:
[image: 1624031060(1).png][image: 1624032003(1).jpg]
在2021年6月18日星期五 UTC+8 下午11:24:49<yuqi zhang> 写道：

>  I did the teamtomo.org EMPIAR-10164. After relion_reconstruct_mpi 1.6Apx 
> refinement, the map was only noise. I used relion 3.0.6. The missing wedge 
> affected the orientation distribution.
> command:   
> *mpirun -np 40 `which relion_reconstruct_mpi` --i subtomograms_1.6Apx.star 
> --o reconstruction_1.6Apx.mrc --3d_rot --ctf*
> [image: reconstruct_1.6A_mrc_view1.jpg][image: 
> reconstruct_1.6A_mrc_view2.jpg]
>
> *I desire that someone can help me check the whole workflow about 
> EMPIAR-10164 teamtomo.org <http://teamtomo.org>. I didn't know which step 
> went wrong. *This tutorial has confused me for several months. Very very 
> thank you.
>
> The warp(version 1.0.9) *preprocessing settings*:
> And I deselected 2 micrographs as the toturial said.
> [image: 1624028532.jpg]
>
> *To generate the .st .rawtlt*
> press "create stack for imod"
> [image: 1624028804(1).jpg]
>
> *dautoalign2warp in dynamo* (I use the IMOD version : 4.12.6)
> *dautoalign4warp('./imod', 1.35, 10, 85.3, './dynamo_alignments')*
>
> *To import the aligned tilt series*
> press "import"
>
> *[image: 1624029277(1).jpg]*
>
> *3dCTF & handness check*
> I knew that the handness was very important. So I pressed the process only 
> this item ctf and check the tilt handness one by one. They are all positive 
> value and I never invert them.
> [image: 1624029411(1).jpg]
>
>
>
>
>
>
